records.ety: [OE. petit, F. petit; probably of Celtic origin, and akin to E. piece. Cf. Petit.]

defs: Little; trifling; inconsiderable; unimportant; also, inferior; subordinate; as, a petty fault; petty complaints; a petty prince.
quotes: Like a petty god I walked about, admired of all.
notes: ☞ For petty constable, petty jury, petty larceny, petty treason, See Petit.
